where.if: AND ( CAST(character_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(character_name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(owner_user_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(owner_client_uid, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(summary, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(operator_name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(batch_no, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(screening_flags, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_character_review_log ( character_id, character_name, owner_user_id, owner_client_uid, review_status, review_reason, operator_name, batch_no, event_type, screening_level, screening_flags, screening_hits, summary, detail_json ) VALUES ( #{characterId}, #{characterName}, #{ownerUserId}, #{ownerClientUid}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewReason}, #{operatorName}, #{batchNo}, #{eventType}, #{screeningLevel}, #{screeningFlags}, #{screeningHits}, #{summary}, #{detailJson} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id AS id, character_id AS characterId, COALESCE(character_name, '') AS characterName, owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, COALESCE(owner_client_uid, '') AS ownerClientUid, review_status AS reviewStatus, COALESCE(review_reason, '') AS reviewReason, COALESCE(operator_name, '') AS operatorName, COALESCE(batch_no, '') AS batchNo, COALESCE(event_type, 'MANUAL_REVIEW') AS eventType, COALESCE(screening_level, 'NONE') AS screeningLevel, COALESCE(screening_flags, '') AS screeningFlags, COALESCE(screening_hits, 0) AS screeningHits, COALESCE(summary, '') AS summary, COALESCE(detail_json, '') AS detailJson, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM app_character_review_log
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COALESCE(screening_flags, '') AS screeningFlags, COALESCE(screening_level, 'NONE') AS screeningLevel FROM app_character_review_log WHERE screening_hits > 0 AND screening_flags IS NOT NULL AND screening_flags != '' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
